'''''Harridan''''' was a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Starfleet]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], ''Harridan'' was serving with [[Sixth Negative Regions|Black Sword Command]], as the guardship assigned to the [[N'zoth]] [[N'zoth system/Legends|system]], protecting [[Black Fifteen|Black-15]] and keeping the native [[Yevetha]] in line. About seven months after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], ''Harridan'' was called away from N'zoth to fight a rear guard action at [[Notak]].

Three weeks later, the Yevetha, led by [[Nil Spaar]], seized the Imperial vessels and [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyards]] at N'zoth, slaughtering or enslaving the local garrison and the civilian population.

==Behind the scenes==
An Imperial ship called ''[[Harramin]]'' is mentioned in ''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' as one of those acquired by the Yevetha, and this has been taken by some to be a mistake for ''Harridan'', with the further implication that she returned to N'zoth and was captured by the Yevetha. However, there seems to be no [[canon]] evidence for this.
